product_overview: Enhance user session stability with proactive JWT refreshes and prevent data loss on the scam report form by autosaving drafts (including uploaded evidence) to localStorage with a 24-hour TTL.
core_goals: Prevent unexpected session expirations during long-running user tasks by proactively refreshing JWT tokens.
Ensure users do not lose partially completed scam reports (including uploaded files) by continuously saving and restoring form drafts.
Provide clear user feedback and recovery options when token refresh or report submission fails.
Maintain privacy/compliance by requiring re-consent to terms on restored drafts and automatically pruning stale drafts after 24 hours.

features.name: Auto-Save Report Draft
features.description: Continuously persist the scam report form Step 3 (including file states) to localStorage under key `cekreput_report_draft`, restore drafts younger than 24 hours on /report, remove `agreedTerms` from restored drafts, and clear the draft after a successful server-side submission.
user_flows: Open report page (/report) -> See previously entered draft values restored from localStorage -> Observe draft age is within 24 hours -> Observe agreedTerms checkbox is unchecked -> Re-check agreedTerms checkbox -> Click Submit -> See success confirmation -> Observe cekreput_report_draft removed from localStorage

Open report page (/report) -> Fill a text field -> Observe draft saved to localStorage (cekreput_report_draft) -> Upload evidence file -> Observe file state saved to localStorage -> Navigate away from page -> Return to /report within 24 hours -> See draft restored including uploaded file states
Open report page (/report) -> System attempts to restore draft from localStorage -> Observe draft is older than 24 hours -> Observe stale draft is deleted from localStorage -> See empty form

Open report page (/report) -> Fill required fields and check agreedTerms -> Click Submit -> Server returns error response for submission -> See submission error message -> Observe draft remains in localStorage for retry

features.name: Proactive JWT Token Refresh
features.description: AuthContext polls every 30 seconds to detect tokens expiring within 5 minutes and automatically refreshes them via POST /api/auth/refresh; shows a session-expiry warning banner with a manual 'Refresh Session' button on Step 3 of the report form and validates token lifespan right before file uploads to avoid mid-upload failures.
user_flows: Open application (AuthContext mounts) -> AuthContext starts 30s polling -> Detect token will expire within 5 minutes -> POST /api/auth/refresh -> Receive refreshed JWT -> Observe new token stored and no user interruption

Navigate to /report -> Start file upload -> File upload component checks token lifespan -> Detect token will expire within 5 minutes -> POST /api/auth/refresh -> Receive refreshed JWT -> Proceed with file upload -> Observe upload completes successfully

Navigate to /report -> Reach Step 3 of report form -> AuthContext detects token near expiry -> See warning banner with 'Refresh Session' button -> Click 'Refresh Session' button -> POST /api/auth/refresh -> Receive error response -> See persistent session-expiry error prompt and option to re-login

routes.description: Report scam form with local storage draft restoring

features.name: Auto-Save Report Draft
features.description: Automatically restore user form inputs from local storage upon page load if saved within 24 hours, and clear upon successful report submission.
user_interactions: See previously entered draft values restored
Submit report successfully to clear the draft

features.name: Proactive JWT Token Refresh Context
features.description: Automatically refresh the authentication JWT token proactively every 30 seconds if it is within 5 minutes of expiry.
